arts.ttl: Millwall pull themselves back into Championship play-off equation
arts.sum: Head coach Alex Neil, facing his former club, was full of praise for the Lions’ response after their Ewood Park reverse, as a brace from Mihailo Ivanovic and a goal from Femi Azeez secured a fourth consecutive home win. Millwall kept their Championship play-off hopes alive with a commanding 3-1 victory over Norwich City at The Den on Easter Monday, bouncing back strongly from their Good Friday defeat at Blackburn.

arts.ttl: Millwall boss on ruptured achilles injury for goalkeeper Jensen plus double midfielder blow
arts.sum: Millwall boss Alex Neil has confirmed that goalkeeper Lukas Jensen has suffered a ruptured achilles tendon which is likely to rule him out for a significant portion of next season. “Lukas Jensen has ruptured his achilles tendon,” said Neil.

arts.ttl: Millwall beat Norwich to revitalise top-six hopes
arts.sum: Millwall roared back into the play-off race after Mihailo Ivanovic scored twice to sink Norwich 3-1 at The Den.

arts.ttl: Mihailo Ivanovic’s double against Norwich fires Millwall back into top-six hunt
arts.sum: The Lions are just three points adrift of Coventry.

arts.ttl: Major injury blow for Millwall as goalkeeper Jensen poised for lengthy spell on sidelines
arts.sum: Asked by the South London Press last week to assess Jensen’s first campaign with the Lions, head coach Alex Neil said: “He’s grown in stature and in confidence in himself in terms of what he’s capable of at the level. Millwall goalkeeper Lukas Jensen is set to be missing for a lengthy period of time after suffering an achilles injury.

arts.ttl: MATCHDAY LIVE: Millwall v Norwich City
arts.sum: Join the debate and follow live updates via our matchday blog as Norwich City face Millwall at the Den on Easter Monday.

arts.ttl: Ex-Norwich boss linked with MLS champions
arts.sum: Former Norwich City head coach David Wagner could be set to take charge of MLS champions LA Galaxy, according to reports.

arts.ttl: 'Ask me in five years' - Thorup not judging Norwich signings yet
arts.sum: Norwich City head coach Johannes Hoff Thorup says it's too early to judge if the Canaries' hefty spend this season was worth the money they paid.

arts.ttl: Neil admits Millwall’s injury toll ahead of Norwich reunion
arts.sum: Former Norwich City manager Alex Neil has admitted that injuries are hurting Millwall as he prepares to for a Championship reunion with the Canaries.

arts.ttl: Championship: Predictions for all 12 games on Monday
arts.sum: Alex Jack has picked out a score prediction for all 12 Championship games taking place on Easter Monday.
